history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, tousled hair is leaning against a wall with a distinctive mosaic tile pattern. He is wearing a dark navy long-sleeved t-shirt and dark wash, slightly baggy jeans. His head is bowed, and his gaze is directed downwards, creating a contemplative or introspective mood.

The background features a wall covered in small, square mosaic tiles with a shimmering, iridescent quality, predominantly in shades of brown, amber, and gold. The tiles are arranged in a grid pattern, reflecting light and creating a textured, almost glittering surface. To the right of the mosaic wall, another wall is visible, painted in a neutral, light beige or cream color with a subtle horizontal texture. A dark brown wooden frame separates the mosaic section from the plain wall.

The lighting appears to be soft and ambient, casting gentle shadows and highlighting the reflective surfaces of the tiles. There's a slight glow emanating from a light source above the mosaic wall, which is subtly visible as a bright square within the tiles. The overall color palette is warm and earthy, dominated by browns, golds, and the deep blue of the man's clothing, contrasted by the neutral beige wall. The mood is subdued and personal, suggesting a moment of quiet reflection or a candid shot. The composition is a medium shot, focusing on the man and the textured wall.
